linkedin_post:
What if your most reliable team member never slept, never missed a deadline, and worked tirelessly on repetitive tasks while you focused on strategy?

That's the reality of Notion Custom Agents in 2026.

These aren't simple automation tools or basic AI assistants. Custom Agents are autonomous AI teammates that continuously execute workflows, intelligently manage data, and handle routine tasks without any human intervention.

The implications are massive: true 24/7 productivity is now accessible to teams of any size. While you're offline, your Custom Agents are organizing databases, processing information, following up on tasks, and keeping projects on track.

We're entering an era where the bottleneck isn't technology—it's our imagination about how to use it. The teams that embrace autonomous AI workflows will have an unprecedented competitive advantage.

Dive deep into how Notion Custom Agents work and how to deploy them for your team:
